scripts.copy:zego: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src=path.join('node_modules','@zegocloud','zego-uikit-prebuilt','zego-uikit-prebuilt.js');const dest=path.join('public','vendor','zego','zego-uikit-prebuilt.js');fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(dest),{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(src,dest);console.log('ZEGO UIKit copied to public/vendor/zego/');"
